data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The .test-index contains a RED marker [test_review_tier_valid_value_passes] for tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_review_tier_valid_value_passes' .test-index
- [ ] The pre-commit test gate tolerates the RED test failure
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'RED zone failures tolerated'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh runs without regressions (pre-existing RED failures only)

## File Impact
- .test-index (verify existing RED marker)
- tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh (no changes expected)
